whatsNew.dialog.title: What’s new in Cmdr

@whatsNew.dialog.title.description: Title of the post-update dialog that summarizes recent changelog entries. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019), not a straight one. Cmdr is the app name; keep it.

whatsNew.dialog.empty: Nothing to see here yet. New changes will show up here after an update.

@whatsNew.dialog.empty.description: Empty-state message in the What's new dialog when there are no changelog entries to show (reachable only via manual reopen).

@whatsNew.dialog.seeFullChangelog.description: Link in the What's new dialog that opens the full online changelog in the browser.

@whatsNew.dialog.optOut.description: Button in the What's new dialog that turns off the post-update changelog popup for good.

@whatsNew.dialog.close.description: Button that closes the What's new dialog.

whatsNew.optOutToast: Got it, no more update notes. Re-enable them anytime in Settings > Updates & privacy.

@whatsNew.optOutToast.description: Confirmation toast after the user opts out of the post-update changelog popup, noting where to turn it back on. Settings > Updates & privacy is a navigation path; keep the menu/section names as shown.
